title: onosmodium revolutum
intro: Onosmodium revolutum, also known as the twisted onosmodium, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onosmodium revolutum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
